description: 将默认的 python2.x 编码规范设置为 utf-8, 如 pep-0263 中所述
set default python2.x encoding specification to utf-8 as it is mentioned in pep-0263.
将默认的 python3 编码规范设置为 utf-8, 默认情况下, 这是 pep-3120 中提到的 python3.x 的编码
Set default python3 encoding specification to utf-8, by default this is the encoding for python3.x as it is mentioned in pep-3120.
